ShortDescription.Value: Unlisted alpha build for testing generated dedicated turn lanes.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Dedicated Turn Lanes Alpha
Dedicated Turn Lanes Alpha is an unlisted tester build for generating dedicated turn lane segments at selected intersections. Hover an intersection to preview eligible incoming roads, then apply the road split and replacement in one workflow.
**This is still an early alpha.** Recent work has focused mostly on stability fixes, so please back up important saves before testing.
## Current Road Matching Rules
The current version only uses the default automatic matching rules:
* The tool looks for a compatible road variant with the **same road width** and a compatible lane layout. * The replacement road must provide **one extra incoming car lane** for the generated dedicated turn lane segment. * Matching supports vanilla roads and roads created with Road Builder, including both two-way and one-way roads. * The tool supports both right-hand and left-hand traffic.
## Credits
* Thanks to Network Tools by Luca for the network editing ideas and reference behavior that helped guide this mod. * Thanks to Traffic by krzychu124 for the lane connection systems and source references that helped shape Traffic integration.
